howItWorks.intro: This shed material calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Studs
rules.explanation: Wall studs at 16-inch centers around the perimeter.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: What size shed can I build without a permit?
faq.a: Most areas allow 100-120 sq ft without a permit. Check local codes.

faq.q: What foundation does a shed need?
faq.a: Gravel pad, concrete blocks, or concrete slab depending on size and local codes.
